            <h5 class="cr-lightbox-review-title">
                Great Watch, Great Price!
            </h5>
            <br>
            
                <span class="a-size-small a-color-secondary cr-lightbox-review-origin">
                    
                        
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                    Reviewed in the United States on February 26, 2026
                                
                            
                        
                    
                </span>
            
        </div>
        <span class="a-size-base cr-lightbox-review-body">
            I always rate watches for what they are…and this is an inexpensive, functional watch with an above average digital display in terms of being backlit well, big numbers for time, day &amp; date and overall very easy to use.  It’s almost always easy to see (even without the light on) regardless of the lighting around you.  So for that it’s a 5/5.  It’s also nice to know it has 10yr battery life.  It initially seems very durable, and the watch band is sturdy yet flexible - I got the large size and it’s plenty big for my larger wrists.  The watch face is the minimum size I’d be good with.  I prefer larger watch faces (mainly for the look), and this is right about there.  Any smaller would not be good for me.  It fits well and is comfortable to wear - it’s only water resistant (not proof), so I’d be leery to test that out myself.  The light works well at night (which you’d expect since it’s called an Illuminator, afterall).<br />
        </span>

      <div data-hook="genome-widget" class="a-row a-spacing-mini"><a href="/gp/profile/amzn1.account.AEPKOOTJRPCP54EUSMNB2U36YWOQ" class="a-profile" data-a-size="small"><div aria-hidden="true" class="a-profile-avatar-wrapper"><div class="a-profile-avatar"><img src="https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif" class="a-lazy-loaded" data-src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/amazon-avatars-global/default.png"/><noscript><img src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/amazon-avatars-global/default.png"/></noscript></div></div><div class="a-profile-content"><span class="a-profile-name">Mr. Lee</span></div></a></div><div class="a-row"><h5><a data-hook="review-title" class="a-size-base a-link-normal review-title a-color-base review-title-content a-text-bold" href="/gp/customer-reviews/R248JOHFOCMLRS/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_ttl?ie=UTF8"><i data-hook="review-star-rating" class="a-icon a-icon-star a-star-5 review-rating"><span class="a-icon-alt">5.0 out of 5 stars</span></i><span class="a-letter-space"></span>







  
  
    <span>The Poor Man&#39;s Rangeman</span>
  
</a></h5></div><span data-hook="review-date" aria-level="6" class="a-size-base a-color-secondary review-date" role="heading">Reviewed in the United States on November 3, 2025</span><div class="a-row a-spacing-mini review-data review-format-strip"><span data-hook="format-strip-linkless" class="a-color-secondary">Color: Tan<i aria-hidden="true" class="a-icon a-icon-text-separator" role="img" aria-label="|"></i>Size: Standard</span><i aria-hidden="true" class="a-icon a-icon-text-separator" role="img" aria-label="|"></i><a aria-label="Verified Purchase: Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon" class="a-link-normal" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="/gp/help/customer/display.html/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_avp?nodeId=G8UYX7LALQC8V9KA"><span data-hook="avp-badge" class="a-size-mini a-color-state a-text-bold">Verified Purchase</span></a></div><div class="a-row a-spacing-small review-data"><span data-hook="review-body" class="a-size-base review-text"><div data-a-expander-name="review_text_read_more" data-a-expander-collapsed-height="300" class="a-expander-collapsed-height a-row a-expander-container a-expander-partial-collapse-container review-text-read-more-expander" style="max-height:300px"><div data-hook="review-collapsed" data-expanded="false" class="a-expander-content reviewText review-text-content a-expander-partial-collapse-content">







  
  
    <span>This is what I would describe as the Poor Man&#39;s, Rangeman 9500. The display is huge on this piece and has a nice wrist presence as well. I was so impressed that I bought the blue and tan resin colors. My plan is to upgrade the plastic, resin strap on both and install NATO straps. It has all your basic functions; Timer, Stopwatch and 5 Alarms. It lacks the Worldtime feature found on most G-Shocks, but does have a secondary time feature you can set for any timezone of your choice. I chose UTC for mine. It has two amber LEDs that light up the dial face very well in low light conditions. Overall its a nice timepiece for a good price. This watch punches way above it&#39;s price point. One drawback I noted on it is it&#39;s acrylic crystal. Mineral glass would&#39;ve been nice, but at this price not a deal breaker because you still get a lot of watch for less than $25.00. I opted to purchase a screen protector for mine, but the raised bezel offers protection to the acrylic crystal as well. If you do manage to scratch it, a little Poly Watch should take care of it. All in and as a Casio/G-Shock fanatic, I&#39;m pleased with my purchase. I also opted for the AE1600 square version of this model. I recommend these for those of us getting long in the tooth and who&#39;s eyesight isn&#39;t what it used to be. These watches with their huge displays make them very easy to read. Keep on Casio rockin&#39; &amp; G-Shock&#39;n.<br /></span>
  
</div><div class="a-expander-header a-expander-partial-collapse-header"><div class="a-expander-content-fade"></div><a href="javascript:void(0)" data-hook="expand-collapse-read-more-less" aria-label="Read more of this review" aria-expanded="false" role="button" data-action="a-expander-toggle" class="a-declarative" data-a-expander-toggle="{&quot;allowLinkDefault&quot;:true, &quot;expand_prompt&quot;:&quot;Read more&quot;, &quot;collapse_prompt&quot;:&quot;Read less&quot;}"><i class="a-icon a-icon-extender-expand"></i><span class="a-expander-prompt">Read more</span></a></div></div></span></div><div class="a-row cr-vote-action-bar"><span class="cr-vote" data-hook="review-voting-widget">

      var lopList = "[fr-CA]";
      var languageOfPreference = "en-US";
      if(isLoPToAutoTranslateAvailable()) {
          // auto translation will be enabled based on cookie value. For 1 or undefined we auto translate and for others we show original
          // for more details refer: https://w.amazon.com/bin/view/NARX/Projects/FRCX-Customer-Reviews/
          var stickyCookieValue = document.cookie.match(/(?:(?:^|.*;\s*)cm-cr-sticky-translate\s*\=\s*([^;]*).*$)|^.*$/).pop();
          // Cookie value will be 1 when reviews are translated So checking if reviews are already translated on page load
          if (stickyCookieValue === undefined || stickyCookieValue === "1") {
              P.when('jQuery', 'ready', 'cr-generic-declarative-actions').execute(function ($) {
                  $('#cr-translate--657341361').click();
              });
          }
      }

      function isLoPToAutoTranslateAvailable() {
          for(const lop of lopList.replace('[', '').replace(']', '').split(',')){
              if(lop.trim() === languageOfPreference) {
                  return true;
              }
          }
          return false;
      }

      <div data-hook="genome-widget" class="a-row a-spacing-mini"><div class="a-profile" data-a-size="small"><div aria-hidden="true" class="a-profile-avatar-wrapper"><div class="a-profile-avatar"><img src="https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif" class="a-lazy-loaded" data-src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/amazon-avatars-global/default.png"/><noscript><img src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/amazon-avatars-global/default.png"/></noscript></div></div><div class="a-profile-content"><span class="a-profile-name">robinhoood</span></div></div></div><div class="a-row a-spacing-none"><h5><i data-hook="cmps-review-star-rating" class="a-icon a-icon-star a-star-5 review-rating"><span class="a-icon-alt">5.0 out of 5 stars</span></i><span class="a-letter-space"></span><span data-hook="review-title" class="a-size-base review-title a-color-base review-title-content a-text-bold">







  
  
    <span>Title: Tough, Reliable, and Stylish – Loving This Olive Green Casio Illuminator!</span>
  
</span></h5></div><span data-hook="review-date" aria-level="6" class="a-size-base a-color-secondary review-date" role="heading">Reviewed in Canada on February 3, 2026</span><div class="a-row a-spacing-mini review-data review-format-strip"><span data-hook="format-strip-linkless" class="a-color-secondary">Color: Green<i aria-hidden="true" class="a-icon a-icon-text-separator" role="img" aria-label="|"></i>Size: Extra Long</span><i aria-hidden="true" class="a-icon a-icon-text-separator" role="img" aria-label="|"></i><a aria-label="Verified Purchase: Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon" class="a-link-normal" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="/gp/help/customer/display.html/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_avp?nodeId=G8UYX7LALQC8V9KA"><span data-hook="avp-badge" class="a-size-mini a-color-state a-text-bold">Verified Purchase</span></a></div><div class="a-row a-spacing-small review-data"><script>
        (function() {
            P.when('cr-A', 'ready').execute(function(A) {

<span data-hook="review-body" class="a-size-base review-text"><div data-a-expander-name="review_text_read_more" data-a-expander-collapsed-height="300" class="a-expander-collapsed-height a-row a-expander-container a-expander-partial-collapse-container review-text-read-more-expander" style="max-height:300px"><div data-hook="review-collapsed" data-expanded="false" class="a-expander-content reviewText review-text-content a-expander-partial-collapse-content">







  
  
    <span>This Casio Illuminator (dark basil/olive green) has been my daily beater for weeks here in Toronto, and it’s exceeded expectations for such an affordable digital watch. The military-inspired olive green resin case and strap give it a rugged, tactical vibe that matches perfectly with casual outfits or outdoor gear—looks way cooler than basic black. The massive, high-visibility LCD display is incredibly easy to read, even from a distance or at odd angles; big bold numbers for time, day, and date—no squinting needed. Features are packed: 5 independent alarms (great for scheduling shifts or reminders), 1/100-second stopwatch, countdown timer, and world time basics—all accessible with intuitive buttons. 100m water resistance means no worries during rain, handwashing, or light swimming—I’ve worn it in showers and snow without issues. The Illuminator backlight lights up the entire screen brightly for nighttime checks, and that 10-year battery life is a game-changer—no charging or replacements anytime soon. Super comfortable on the wrist despite the larger 51mm case; lightweight resin, extra-long strap fits perfectly (even over sleeves), and it sits snug without bulk. Buttons are responsive and clicky, no accidental presses, and the overall build feels durable for everyday abuse. Only tiny gripe: the beeping on alarms/modes is loud and can’t be silenced easily, but it’s minor for the price. Overall, this is an unbeatable value—rugged, feature-rich, legible, and stylish in green. Perfect for work, travel, or anyone wanting a no-fuss reliable watch. 5/5 stars – If you’re after a tough digital Casio with military flair and insane battery life, grab this one—you won’t regret it!<br /></span>
  
</div><div class="a-expander-header a-expander-partial-collapse-header"><div class="a-expander-content-fade"></div><a href="javascript:void(0)" data-hook="expand-collapse-read-more-less" aria-label="Read more of this review" aria-expanded="false" role="button" data-action="a-expander-toggle" class="a-declarative" data-a-expander-toggle="{&quot;allowLinkDefault&quot;:true, &quot;expand_prompt&quot;:&quot;Read more&quot;, &quot;collapse_prompt&quot;:&quot;Read less&quot;}"><i class="a-icon a-icon-extender-expand"></i><span class="a-expander-prompt">Read more</span></a></div></div></span></div><div class="a-popover-preload" id="a-popover-R18HZLH9633DR9_gallerySection_main">

        <div class="a-section a-spacing-mini cr-review-stars-and-title">

            <div class="a-row a-spacing-mini">
                <div class="a-profile cr-lightbox-customer-profile" data-a-size="small"><div aria-hidden="true" class="a-profile-avatar-wrapper"><div class="a-profile-avatar"><img src="https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif" class="a-lazy-loaded" data-src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/amazon-avatars-global/default.png"/><noscript><img src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/amazon-avatars-global/default.png"/></noscript></div></div><div class="a-profile-content"><span class="a-profile-name">robinhoood</span></div></div>
            </div>

            <i class="a-icon a-icon-star a-star-5 cr-lightbox-review-rating"><span class="a-icon-alt">5.0 out of 5 stars</span></i>
            <h5 class="cr-lightbox-review-title">
                Title: Tough, Reliable, and Stylish – Loving This Olive Green Casio Illuminator!
            </h5>
            <br>
            
                <span class="a-size-small a-color-secondary cr-lightbox-review-origin">
                    
                        
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                    Reviewed in Canada on February 3, 2026
                                
                            
                        
                    
                </span>
            
        </div>
        <span class="a-size-base cr-lightbox-review-body">
            This Casio Illuminator (dark basil/olive green) has been my daily beater for weeks here in Toronto, and it’s exceeded expectations for such an affordable digital watch. The military-inspired olive green resin case and strap give it a rugged, tactical vibe that matches perfectly with casual outfits or outdoor gear—looks way cooler than basic black. The massive, high-visibility LCD display is incredibly easy to read, even from a distance or at odd angles; big bold numbers for time, day, and date—no squinting needed. Features are packed: 5 independent alarms (great for scheduling shifts or reminders), 1/100-second stopwatch, countdown timer, and world time basics—all accessible with intuitive buttons. 100m water resistance means no worries during rain, handwashing, or light swimming—I’ve worn it in showers and snow without issues. The Illuminator backlight lights up the entire screen brightly for nighttime checks, and that 10-year battery life is a game-changer—no charging or replacements anytime soon. Super comfortable on the wrist despite the larger 51mm case; lightweight resin, extra-long strap fits perfectly (even over sleeves), and it sits snug without bulk. Buttons are responsive and clicky, no accidental presses, and the overall build feels durable for everyday abuse. Only tiny gripe: the beeping on alarms/modes is loud and can’t be silenced easily, but it’s minor for the price. Overall, this is an unbeatable value—rugged, feature-rich, legible, and stylish in green. Perfect for work, travel, or anyone wanting a no-fuss reliable watch. 5/5 stars – If you’re after a tough digital Casio with military flair and insane battery life, grab this one—you won’t regret it!<br />
        </span>

    <script>
    (function() {
      P.when('jQuery', 'cr-A', 'ready').execute(function ($) {
        var setLangAttr;
        
            setLangAttr = function ($this, lang) {
              $this.closest('li[data-hook="review"]').find('.cr-original-review-content').attr('lang', lang);
            }
          

        $('.cr-translate-this-review-section').each(function () {
          var $this = $(this);
          var data = $this.find('[data-action="reviews:ajax-post"]').data('reviews:ajax-post');

          if (data) {
            try {
              var lang = JSON.parse(data.params.reviews)[0].locale.language;
              if (lang) {
                setLangAttr($this, lang);
              }
            } catch (ex) {
              //fail silently
            }
          }
        });
      });
    })();
  </script>
